ddls:
CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "profile_link" TEXT /* Link to the theme's profile page */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the theme */,
  "github_stars" INTEGER /* Number of GitHub stars for the theme */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Date the theme was last updated */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the theme is released */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the theme */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Total number of downloads for the theme */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the theme was first created */,
  "last_downloaded" TEXT /* Date of the last download */,
  "screenshot_url" TEXT /* URL to a screenshot or preview image of the theme */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the theme is featured on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_themes_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "github_profile" TEXT /* Link to the author's GitHub profile */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the author's personal website or blog */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author (for internal use) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "repo_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "fork_count" INTEGER /* Number of forks on GitHub */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the repository was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theme_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theme_tags_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text accompanying the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the rating and review have been approved by a moderator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, author, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theme_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme being downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the theme */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the theme was downloaded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who downloaded the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theme_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theme_downloads_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theme_repos" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "theme_repo_url" TEXT /* URL of the theme's repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the association between the theme and repository was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id", "repo_id")
)
